mapper.select: SELECT login_info_table.uAccount, login_info_table.uName, login_info_table.organization_name, login_info_table.departmentCode, department_table.departmentName, login_info_table.headerImageUrl, GROUP_CONCAT( authority_table.authority_key ORDER BY authority_table.authority_key SEPARATOR ',' ) AS authority_key FROM login_info_table INNER JOIN user_authority_table ON user_authority_table.uAccount = login_info_table.uAccount INNER JOIN authority_table ON authority_table.authority_code = user_authority_table.authority_code INNER JOIN department_table ON department_table.departmentCode=login_info_table.departmentCode WHERE login_info_table.uAccount = #{account} and login_info_table.uPasswordEncode=#{pass} GROUP BY login_info_table.uAccount, login_info_table.uName, login_info_table.departmentCode, department_table.departmentName, login_info_table.organization_name, login_info_table.headerImageUrl

SELECT l.uAccount, l.uEmail, l.uName, l.uGender, l.organization_name, l.departmentCode, l.headerImageUrl, d.departmentName FROM login_info_table l INNER JOIN department_table d ON d.departmentCode = l.departmentCode WHERE l.uEmail = #{email} GROUP BY l.uAccount, l.uEmail, l.uName, l.uGender, l.departmentCode, d.departmentName, l.organization_name, l.headerImageUrl
